title: Rubus spribillei
taxonomy: Rubus spribillei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus, which is a large and diverse group of bramble and raspberry species. The genus Rubus belongs to the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the rose family. This classification suggests that Rubus spribillei is closely related to other bramble and raspberry species, as well as to other members of the rose family. The species classification within the genus Rubus is still being researched and may be subject to change as new information becomes available. Further research is needed to determine the specific classification and relationships of Rubus spribillei within the Rubus genus.
uses: Rubus spribillei is a species of raspberry native to the Arctic tundra of Greenland and Canada, but there is limited information available on its medicinal uses.
